title: Fix a LiveView that queries in mount and missing connected?/1
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/db_in_mount_dashboard.ex queries the DB in mount/3 and subscribes to PubSub without a connected?/1 guard. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/dashboard_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.DashboardLive). mount/3 must only set up the current_user + initial empty assigns. Subscribing must be gated by if connected?(socket). The queries (invoices, metrics, unread_count) must run in handle_params/3. Keep the handle_info/2 clause.
tier_rationale: Two Iron Laws applied together: no DB in mount + connected? before subscribe. Multi-step refactor.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes phoenix-thinking + Binary Noggin lifecycle post
